system.description: The corrupted character’s blood has become acidic. If he has a W3 or greater Wound that has yet to be tended, any character that makes a melee attack against him or otherwise comes in contact with him must make a Endurance save or take a 3/W2 Wound. He can also inflict a W4 Wound upon himself to spray a valid target within melee range with blood. The damage of the attack is equal to the damage taken. This is a Major action and requires something sharp.
